title: File read tracker: LRU contains global state, canonicalize() may return different paths for relative vs absolute inputs
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Cognitive Readability / State Management

**Location:** /home/doll/OpenClaudia/src/tools/file/mod.rs lines 26-71 (ReadFileTracker), 43-55 (mark_read), 58-64 (has_been_read)

**Violation:**
The READ_TRACKER is a global LazyLock<ReadFileTracker> that holds a Mutex<Vec<PathBuf>>. Several defects:
1. **Canonicalization fallback hides bugs.** Both mark_read (line 44) and has_been_read (line 59) use: std::fs::canonicalize(path).unwrap_or_else(|_| path.to_path_buf()). If canonicalize fails (permissions, non-existent, symlink-loop), the raw path is used. This means read_file('./foo.txt') can canonicalize to /abs/foo.txt, but edit_file('foo.txt') from a different CWD (see worktree CWD mutation) may fail canonicalize and compare the raw string 'foo.txt' against '/abs/foo.txt' — and the gate trips even after a successful read.
2. **Linear scan through 10,000-element Vec per has_been_read.** An agent that operates on many files pays O(n) on every edit. Should be HashSet<PathBuf>.
3. **No TTL.** A file read 2000 edits ago still satisfies has_been_read. If the file changed on disk since, the model edits based on stale content — exactly what the read-before-edit gate was supposed to prevent.
4. **Global singleton prevents test isolation.** reset_read_tracker at mod.rs:62 is a #[doc(hidden)] escape hatch proving the design is wrong — tests have to reach into global state. Makes parallel tests flaky.

**Mandated Refactor:**
1. Move READ_TRACKER onto SessionState, passed through ToolContext. Eliminate the LazyLock global entirely.
2. Replace Vec<PathBuf> with LinkedHashMap / IndexMap<PathBuf, FileFingerprint> where FileFingerprint = { mtime, size, read_at }. On has_been_read, re-stat the file; if (mtime, size) differs, consider it not read.
3. Fail canonicalize with a hard error instead of falling back to raw path — inconsistent identity under fallback is the root cause of the path-comparison bug.
4. Cap at 1024 files per session; LRU-evict oldest.
